feature: DEC-35 — Mongolian-appropriate P2P recipient confirmation + enumeration rate-limit
requirement: Amend DEC-35 (CONFIRM -> AMEND) and the aligned rules in 03/04. The product owner ratified, via AskUserQuestion, the 'short form + rate-limit' option: recipient confirmation shows the standard Mongolian short form (patronymic initial + given name, e.g. Cyrillic 'Ц. Бат'), and the anti-fishing defence moves from name-masking (which does not translate to Mongolian names, since the given name IS the identity) to a per-sender velocity cap on recipient-lookup, seeded in US-12.5. This resolves the DEC-6/DEC-35 contradiction found in run 20260720-161202. The ratification is DONE; this run only drafts, applies and verifies it.
backlog: DEC-18 currency: USD -> MNT. 312 monetary values across 6 documents; 03_acceptance_criteria.md holds 216 of them. Needs a redenomination policy first (spot-rate conversion vs re-derivation from Mongolian incomes) because most are thresholds, not illustrations.

Payment rails: 56 ACH/FedNow/SEPA references -> Banksuljee (RTGS, above MNT 5,000,000) / ACH+ (at or below) / NETC for cards. The threshold is set by Governor's order, so it must land as configuration, not a literal.

Vendors: Stripe, Plaid, Lithic, Persona. Note these are leaked into schema field names (persona_inquiry_id, plaid_item_ref) and API error codes (502 PLAID_UNAVAILABLE), so removal is a requirements change, not an integration change.
KPI re-baselining: KPI-1.3 targets 100,000 members against a total Mongolian SCC sector of 78,608; KPI-2.1 targets AUM roughly 1.5x the entire sector's assets.
Rate model: DEC-48's 12% APR base sits below the 17.45% bank-funded market rate, and DEC-49's 6% floor is the subsidised state mortgage rate. Both sides of the spread are inverted.

00_market_research.md is entirely US/EU-framed — competitor set is Alliant, Desjardins, Coop Pank, Monzo; segments are Gen Z ESG consumers and W-2-adjacent gig workers. Needs rewriting against the Mongolian market, not editing.

verify-docs.sh blind spot: the first_name/last_name HARD check matches only the snake_case tokens, so the same Western name model expressed in prose ('embossed_name from first/last name' at 04:829, 04:1087) passes silently. Add a DRIFT counter for the prose form.
verify-docs.sh n_snake_name uses grep -rEoh with no context exclusion, unlike the money-type check which excludes 'minor units|rejected|superseded'. Decide whether that is intended.
Migration map item [1] writes 'etsgiin ner' with a space where every other item uses 'etsgiin_ner'. Decide the canonical spelling before it propagates (also appears at 01:256 F-105).
T6 attempt could not corroborate that a Law on Financial Cooperatives passed committee 2026-04-07 — treat [UNVERIFIED] until a primary source is opened.

tasks.title: Draft the DEC-35 amendment + enumeration rate-limit + migration map
tasks.description:
DRAFT ONLY — edit no requirements document; the deliverable is a committed handoff with a mechanically-applicable map.

The product owner has ratified (via AskUserQuestion) the 'short form + rate-limit' option. Draft the text and locate every place it lands. Do NOT re-open the decision.

(1) DEC-35 amendment at 05_prd_and_roadmap.md:159. Change status CONFIRM -> AMEND. New display rule: recipient confirmation shows the standard Mongolian short form = patronymic initial + given name, e.g. Cyrillic 'Ц. Бат' (Latin 'Ts. Bat'). New rationale: name-masking does not translate to Mongolian names because the ner (given name) IS the identity, not a low-cardinality family name; so the anti-fishing defence moves to a per-sender velocity cap on the recipient-lookup operation, seeded in US-12.5. Reference DEC-33 (existing P2P velocity limit) and the existing enumeration protection.

(2) The [PROPOSED] display line at 03_acceptance_criteria.md:476 — reword to the short form and note the anti-fishing shift.

(3) The 'Member B.' happy-path scenario at 03_acceptance_criteria.md:484-486 — update the shown display name to the new form.

(4) The new lookup-velocity control. Determine the LEAST-invasive correct home. Note that 03_acceptance_criteria.md:368 ALREADY has enumeration protection (404 Not Found), the recipient-lookup endpoint is at 04_technical_architecture.md:810, and DEC-33 at 05:157 already seeds a P2P velocity limit. Decide: is a NEW DEC needed, or does DEC-35's amendment plus an EP-4 business-rule line plus a note on the 04:810 endpoint suffice? Recommend the smaller option and justify. A new US-12.5 config seed (lookups per sender per period) with NO hard-coded number is expected — do not invent a specific threshold; mark it as a PO-confirmable seed.

Establish every location yourself with grep; do not trust these line numbers blindly — the last run found the plan's line/section refs were sometimes wrong. For each occurrence: file, line, current text, exact replacement.

VERIFIER NOTE: run .softhouse/verify-docs.sh mentally against your replacement text. The Cyrillic examples introduce no USD/rails/vendor tokens, and 'first name' (prose, space) is not the first_name token — but confirm none of your new text contains $-amounts, ACH/FedNow/SEPA, or vendor names.

HONESTY RULE: mark each material claim [VERIFIED: source] or [UNVERIFIED]. In particular, whether 'patronymic initial + given name' is genuinely the incumbent Mongolian bank-app convention is a useful supporting claim but is [UNVERIFIED] unless you can name a source — the decision does not depend on it, so do not manufacture a citation.

Handoff: ## Changes Made / ## Decisions / ## Sources / ## Unverified / ## Blockers / ## Follow-ups. Commit it to branch softhouse/T1-dec35-draft.

tasks.title: Review the DEC-35 draft
tasks.description:
Independent adversarial review of T1. Assume defects exist. Read from the branch: `git show softhouse/T1-dec35-draft:.softhouse/handoff/20260721-dec35/T1.md` and `git diff main...softhouse/T1-dec35-draft`.

Check: (1) the amendment matches the RATIFIED option exactly — short form 'Ц. Бат' AND the anti-fishing-moves-to-rate-limit reasoning; a draft that quietly reverts to masking, or that invents a masking scheme, is a defect; (2) the map is mechanically applicable — file/line/current/replacement, and every 'Member B.'-style display occurrence is caught, INCLUDING any in prose the token check cannot see (grep the corpus yourself — this exact class of prose blind spot is why this task exists); (3) the rate-limit lands with NO hard-coded threshold and correctly references US-12.5 + DEC-33 + the existing 03:368 enumeration protection rather than duplicating them; (4) does it over-reach — adding a whole new DEC when extending existing rules would do? (5) no OTHER ratified DEC-n changed (DEC-1..20 in 01 §6, DEC-21..75 in 05 §3 — especially DEC-3 which governs P2P addressing and is deliberately untouched); (6) .softhouse/verify-docs.sh would not regress; (7) provenance markers real, per the honesty rule.

Report findings as severity/location/what/fix. Verdict APPROVED / MICRO-FIX / REJECTED. Commit to branch softhouse/T2-review-dec35.

tasks.title: Apply the DEC-35 amendment
tasks.description:
Apply the approved T1 map (read it from its branch). You DO edit documents.

Edit 05_prd_and_roadmap.md (DEC-35 row, status -> AMEND), 03_acceptance_criteria.md (the [PROPOSED] line and the happy-path scenario), and whichever of 04_technical_architecture.md the approved map specifies for the lookup-velocity control. Apply exactly what the map says and nothing more — scope is DEC-35 and its aligned rules only; do not touch currency, rails, vendors, the name model, or any other DEC.

Amend DEC-35 in place — do not renumber. Preserve every header block, ID convention and traceability table. Use the Cyrillic display example verbatim as drafted.

BEFORE FINISHING run .softhouse/verify-docs.sh — it must stay at VERDICT: PASS (HARD all 0, DRIFT all = baseline). Report the before/after. Commit to branch softhouse/T3-apply-dec35 including your handoff.

tasks.title: Review the applied amendment
tasks.description:
Independent adversarial review of T3's branch. Read `git diff main...softhouse/T3-apply-dec35` and the handoff.

Check: every map item applied verbatim, nothing beyond scope crept in; DEC-35 amended in place (same id/position); the display change is consistent EVERYWHERE it appears across 03/04/05 — cross-document contradiction is this project's characteristic failure; the rate-limit control is coherent with DEC-33 and 03:368 and carries no hard-coded number; no other DEC-n altered; header/IDs/traceability intact. Run .softhouse/verify-docs.sh yourself and report the numbers — it must be PASS. Verdict APPROVED / MICRO-FIX / REJECTED. Commit to branch softhouse/T4-review-apply-dec35.

tasks.title: Verify the baseline on merged main
tasks.description: Run .softhouse/verify-docs.sh on merged main and report the full output. Expected: VERDICT PASS, HARD all 0, DRIFT all = baseline (usd=312, rails=56, vendor=83). Do NOT re-baseline. Additionally confirm by grep that 'Member B.' / 'first name + last initial' no longer appears as the recipient-confirmation display in 03 or 05, and that the Cyrillic short-form example is present.
